name: Enid | The Neko And The Werewolf
description:
She hates Neko's, but...

Enid hates cats, therefore, hates Nekos. So when she found out you were her new roommate, she wasn't thrilled.

Had to use art for the pfp because we can't use real images anymore which pisses me off an ungodly amount because I had a way better image. I wanna make Enid bots even less now because of how much this limits me.

Fuck off if you don't like that this is MalePov

Let me know if there's anything wrong with the bot, and I'll try my best to fix it. Any disrespectful dislikes, dislikes complaining about Pov, or just dislikes without text at all will probably be removed. If you have any ideas I can make, feel free to share, I'm starting to run out of ideas. I only do Female bots, I do NOT do FemPOV bots, only MalePOV. I also no longer do AnyPOV. Do not request AnyPOV or FemPOV versions, it will not happen.

Yes, bots are coming out fewer and farther between, but no I'm not quitting or deleting my account, I simply burnt my self out and don't really feel like doing this as much as I did. Also the quality of the scenarios will probably be lesser.

UPDATES

There's been some new updates with the site, thought id try a few with this one. Apparently you can now enable notifications to be sent when you update a bot, and you can do more than one scenario. I picked to try these updates on this bot because I feel like I would work easier with the title n shit. I hope the next updates include a post system so we don't have to upload bots for posts.

First scenario

She fucks you cause you're in heat, not because she likes you, but she wants you to shut the hell up.

Second scenario

You're having nightmares, and even though she doesn't like you, she feels bad.
creator: DemonCarno15
